name: Tip Calculator
titleTag: Tip Calculator - Calculate Tips Quickly | Smart Calculator Pro
metaDescription: Calculate tips, split bills, and determine per-person costs with our free tip calculator. Perfect for restaurants and group dining.
intro: Calculate tips quickly and easily. Enter your bill amount to see tip amounts at different percentages and split the bill among friends.
shortDescription: Calculate tips and split bills among friends.
longDescription: This calculator helps you determine the appropriate tip for various service scenarios and allows you to split the total bill evenly among multiple people.
problemSolved: Helps users calculate tips and split restaurant bills.

inputs.label: Bill Amount
inputs.explanation: The total bill amount before tip.

inputs.label: Tip Percentage
inputs.explanation: The percentage you want to tip.

inputs.label: Split Between
inputs.explanation: Number of people to split the bill between.

outputs.label: Per Person
outputs.explanation: Amount each person pays if splitting.

formula.label: Tip Calculation Formula
formula.plainText: Tip equals bill amount times tip percentage divided by 100. Total equals bill plus tip.

formulaExplanation: Total with tip = bill amount + tip amount
Per person = total with tip ÷ number of people
methodologyNotes: Standard tipping in the US is 15-20% for good service
Different countries have different tipping customs
Tip percentage may vary based on service quality and dining context

example.scenario: A $50 bill with 20% tip, split between 2 people.
example.resultSummary: The tip is $10, making the total $60. Split between 2 people, each pays $30.

resultInterpretation.defaultText: Use this calculator to quickly determine appropriate tips for various situations. Standard tipping in the US ranges from 15% to 20% depending on service quality.
warningMessages: Tipping customs vary significantly by country. Research local customs when traveling abroad.
Consider tipping more for exceptional service, especially for small bills where percentage-based tips may seem low.

faq.question: How much should I tip?
faq.answer: In the US, standard tipping is 15-20% for restaurants. Tip 15% for average service, 18% for good service, and 20% or more for excellent service. Other service industries may have different norms.

faq.question: Do I tip on tax?
faq.answer: Most people tip on the pre-tax amount, though some tip on the total including tax. Either approach is acceptable in the US.

faq.question: Should I tip for takeout?
faq.answer: Tipping for takeout is generally not required in the US, though a small tip (5-10%) is appreciated for large or complicated orders.

disclaimer: This calculator provides mathematical results only. Tipping is personal and may vary based on local customs, service quality, and personal preference.
